description.ko: 순수한 백색광이 일련의 결정체 기하학적 구조를 통해 선명한 프리즘 색상의 만화경으로 흩어지는 매혹적인 빛의 굴절 현상으로, PRISM-2 렌즈의 정밀함을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing display of light refraction where pure white beams shatter into a vivid kaleidoscope of prismatic colors through a series of crystalline geometric structures, showcasing the precision of the PRISM-2 lens.

prompt: A high-tech PRISM-2 lens unit capturing complex light refraction, hyper-realistic macro photography of a crystalline prism, pure white light beam splitting into a vivid rainbow spectral dispersion, caustic light patterns on a dark minimalist background, glowing iridescent edges, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, sharp focus, optical physics aesthetic.
